name: c19qrserver.local
prose:
# API for the COVID-19 Tracking QR Code Signin Server. API

This is the API for the COVID-19 Contact Tracing QRCode Signin Server

## Getting started

The API for the COVID-19 Tracking QR Code Signin Server. API is a JSON REST API. All endpoints are relative to the base URL `http://c19qrserver.local`.

## Authentication

Authenticate by passing your API key in the `token` header on every request.

## API reference

### POST /changePassword
Used for changing your password

### POST /login
Log in to get an API token

### POST /logout
Log out

### POST /requestPasswordReset
Used for requesting a password reset code

### POST /signin
Create a new signin record

### GET /signin/{signinId}
Retrieve the information associated with a signin record
Returns a single record.

### PUT /signin/{signinId}
Update a signin record

### DELETE /signin/{signinId}
Delete a signin record

### GET /signins
Get signin info
Returns a list of records.
Accepts query parameters: `less_than`, `return_count`.

Sample response:

```json
[ { "id": 1 }, { "id": 2 } ]
```

### POST /user
Create a user

### GET /user/{userId}
Retrieve the information associated with a team member's user record
Returns a single record.

### DELETE /user/{userId}
Delete a team member's user record

### GET /users
Retrieve the information associated with all team members' user records
Returns a list of records.

Sample response:

```json
[ { "id": 1 }, { "id": 2 } ]
```

### POST /verifyPasswordChange
Used for resetting your password when you forgot it
